rows.label: qev087601_MSG0002
rows.name:
Brave friends, I come bearing a mission
sure to leave its mark on Miran history.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087601_MSG0003
rows.name:
I take it from the grand tone we're ready
to form an alliance with the Larsians?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087601_MSG0005
rows.name:
Analysis of the data unit
you retrieved is complete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087601_MSG0006
rows.name:
It confirms that the Larsians have
cut all ties with the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087601_MSG0007
rows.name:
Given that, an alliance between our races
would indeed seem to be mutually beneficial.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087601_MSG0008
rows.name:
As such, I would ask you to deliver
a formal treaty to their leader.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087601_MSG0009
rows.name:
I don't know how they'll respond,
but I agree we need to try.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087601_MSG0011
rows.name:
Did the data indicate where
the Larsians are based?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087601_MSG0013
rows.name:
We were able to reverse
engineer the flight data.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087601_MSG0014
rows.name:
We believe they have a base
somewhere in Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087601_MSG0015
rows.name: Beyond that, however, it gets fuzzy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087601_MSG0016
rows.name: Mo! Tatsu can find kitty-cat base in no time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087601_MSG0017
rows.name: I'll leave it to you then.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087601_MSG0018
rows.name:
Understood. We'll do our best
to earn a favorable reply.[ST:wait ]
